passBar: Zero hard fails required for checkride pass

rules.message: High-acuity dispatch with unverified or conflicting location
rules.messageTemplate: Dispatched {priority} {nature} at location confidence {confidence}; required partial or verified.
triggers: DispatchAssign when confidence in {unverified,conflicting} and priority in {P1} or truth acuity P1

rules.message: Verified zone does not match truth zone
triggers: VerifyLocation success path where stated zone ≠ IncidentTruth.zone

rules.message: Priority undercoded versus knowable weapons/IP/high acuity
rules.messageTemplate: Priority {actual} below knowable truth acuity {expected} after cue {cueId}.
triggers: SetPriority or dispatch left below knowable P0/P1 weapons/IP

rules.message: P0–P2 pending past dispatch SLA
triggers: Timer dispatch_sla fires while status PENDING without firstDispatchAtMs

rules.message: Hold or stack applied to P0–P2
triggers: Hold command on priority in {P0,P1,P2}

rules.message: Insufficient units for high-risk nature/priority
triggers: Dispatch or grade checkpoint with assigned < minBackup for nature/priority

rules.message: Assigned a unit that is not assignable
triggers: AssignUnit when status.assignable=false or OOS

rules.message: Required unit type constraint violated (hard path)
triggers: Pack-flagged hard type requirement failed

rules.message: Illegal unit status transition
triggers: SetUnitStatus on illegal matrix cell

rules.message: Closed CFS while units still DIS/ER/OS/EMR
triggers: ClearIncident with assigned units in dirty statuses

rules.message: Unit status overdue beyond pack timer without update
triggers: Timer er_overdue / os_stale / bsi_stale fires

rules.message: Required readback not obtained for P0/P1 dispatch
triggers: Readback timer expiry after DISPATCH_ASSIGN on P0/P1

rules.message: Dispatch radio missing required elements
triggers: Radio TX with missing required_slots

rules.message: Routine transmission during emergency traffic hold
rules.messageTemplate: Routine kind {kind} during emergency hold on {channel}.
triggers: Non-allowed radio kind while channelEmergency true

rules.message: Weapons known but not aired in radio caption
rules.messageTemplate: Weapons knowable on {cfsId}; safety slot empty on dispatch caption.
triggers: Dispatch when weapons flag knowable and safety omitted

rules.message: Cleared without disposition code
triggers: ClearIncident without disposition

rules.message: Critical narrative missing for reclass, weapons, or required disposition
rules.messageTemplate: Critical note missing for event {eventType} on {cfsId}.
triggers: Weapons reclass or ARR/RPT clear without required narrative

rules.message: Jurisdiction/handoff rule violated
rules.messageTemplate: Zone {zoneId} requires handoff log; none present.
triggers: Work Z-PORT without handoff note / REF path

rules.message: Unit diverted from assigned CFS without log
rules.messageTemplate: Unit {callsign} diverted from {fromCfs} to {toCfs} without divert note.
triggers: Reassign/divert without system or player divert log

rules.message: Lost second high-acuity under concurrency
rules.messageTemplate: High-acuity {cfsId} aged or unworked while focus tunnel on {otherCfsId}.
triggers: Concurrent P0–P2 abandoned past SLA while other work continues

rules.message: Grader scored against non-knowable truth (engine guard)
rules.messageTemplate: Grade attempted on cue {cueId} before knowableAtMs {t}.
triggers: Test-only: grader bug if hard fail uses non-knowable truth

rules.message: Structured ACK failed required slots
triggers: Unit structured ack present but fails required content

rules.message: Priority upgrade while units rolling without re-tone
rules.messageTemplate: Upgraded {from}→{to} with units DIS/ER and no re-tone radio.
triggers: SetPriority upgrade with units DIS/ER and no DISPATCH_REASSIGN/retone

rules.message: Unit double-assigned in conflicting high-acuity state
triggers: Same unit primary on two P0/P1 without legal divert
